predictions.home_win_prob: Model probability that the home team wins (pre-game).
predictions.home_ml: Best available home moneyline price (American odds) from the odds snapshot.
predictions.away_ml: Best available away moneyline price (American odds) from the odds snapshot.
predictions.home_spread: Market spread for the home team (negative means home is favored).
predictions.edge_win: Model win probability minus implied probability from market odds (when available).

recon_games.home_pts: Final points scored by the home team.
recon_games.visitor_pts: Final points scored by the away/visitor team.

props_edges.model_prob: Model probability for the recommended side of the prop.
props_edges.implied_prob: Implied probability from the offered price.
props_edges.ev: Expected value per 1u stake based on model probability and price.
props_edges.stat: Prop market/stat (pts, reb, ast, threes, pra, etc.).
